hyperedges.label: Safety-critical control pipeline: input state -> mapper safety rules -> supervisor watchdogs
Dual-core BLE threading pattern: Core 0 connect/motor tasks serialized via TX mutex, Core 1 loop
Three-tier configuration priority: NVS overrides > .env build flags > compiled device_config.h defaults
M25 packet encode/decode pipeline (protocol framing + crypto + packet codec)
Mirrored connect/disconnect event handling across BLE and RFCOMM transports
Wheel identity/config/state management (compile defaults + NVS runtime override + simulated state)
Joystick input to encrypted BLE wheel command pipeline
Fake wheel serial command drives state, LED and buzzer feedback
BLE wheel discovery, connect/disconnect exposed via serial and WebSocket UI
Arduino Test Hardware Feedback System
BLE Notification Power-Efficiency Pattern
M25 Remote Control Protocol Command Mapping
